source: BLOCKER 1 fix; tests Phase 3 D-19 6-key envelope on MissingCountyDataError
notes: BLOCKER 1 fixture: county_fips='999' is NOT in data/reference/conforming-limits-2026.yml AND loan_amount > baseline ($832,750), so lib.rules.loan_type.classify raises MissingCountyDataError. scripts/affordability.py main() catches the exception and emits the Phase 3 D-19 6-key envelope on stderr instead of a Python traceback. Calling evaluate(request) DIRECTLY would raise MissingCountyDataError (Python exception, not blocked_by); only the CLI surface emits the envelope. Therefore this fixture has no expected_response — it has expected_stderr_envelope (matched by the test_cli_missing_county_data_emits_six_key_envelope test).
